title: Replication Package of "Towards the Isolation of Failure-Inducing Inputs in Cyber-Physical Systems: is Delta Debugging Enough?"
author: Pablo Valle Entrena
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This replication package can be used to replicate our results from our SANER 2022 paper titled as "Towards the Isolation of Failure-Inducing Inputs in Cyber-Physical Systems: is Delta Debugging Enough?"
steps_raw: This replication package can be used to replicate our results from our SANER 2022 paper titled as "Towards the Isolation of Failure-Inducing Inputs in Cyber-Physical Systems: is Delta Debugging Enough?"
